creator: pete@nomadlogic.org
text:
Created attachment 240724
patch to install auth.conf

I've noticed that on my systems running CURRENT /etc/dma/auth.conf is not installed, despite /etc/dma/dma.conf being present.  It's useful to have auth.conf present so users will easily understand the file format when setting up delivery to a remote MTA.

the attached patch takes care of this, and worked on my local workstation.
